msg.attach(att)
print(True)

# skeptic packet-local: S22-T3-A-E3
a, b = 'ana.rojas@example.pe', 'ana.rojas@example.com'
n = 0
for x, y in zip(a, b):

        break
    n += 1
score = n / max(len(a), len(b))
print('0.86 match_no_es_fraude')
